summary: Implemented and pushed the next DinoBrain goal slice. Added a status refresh pipeline that rebuilds required artifacts in dependency order, made status freshness self-reference safe, classified RAG golden evaluation artifacts as OS-generated drift in full-memory audit, and added explicit RAG proof artifacts/evaluator gate wiring. Verified P0-01 full-memory audit regression, P0-02 status freshness regression/current refresh, review/semantic settlement, task lifecycle/settlement, RAG proof/eval, TypeScript check, and verify:goal. verify:goal now passes the requested local gates and still fails only on real Codex Desktop live pre-response proof due stale MCP/no fresh UserPromptSubmit event.
decisions: Keep status:freshness as a check-only command and add status:refresh for dependency-order rebuild plus final freshness check.
Treat .dino/evaluations artifacts such as rag-golden.json as OS-generated live drift, not unclassified user content drift.
Keep local_text_hashing_v1 dense vectors honest as deterministic RAG proof artifacts rather than external semantic embeddings.
Do not mark the overall persistent goal complete because real Codex Desktop live pre-response proof still fails.
next_steps: Restart/repair stale DinoBrain MCP/Codex hook runtime and produce a fresh real Codex Desktop UserPromptSubmit event, then rerun npm run verify:goal.
Implement native/runtime authority gates, route/evidence/owner mutation gate, source lineage closure, Korean UI proof, release/new-PC recovery, and multi-PC sync safety from the improvement plan.
